description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, vertically oriented windows and a mix of glass and solid wall sections. The front features a covered carport with a parked car, a small green lawn with a tree, and a main entrance door with sidelights. The roof includes a rooftop terrace area with outdoor furniture, and the rear of the house has a partially covered patio space. The house is set on a rectangular plot with paved walkways and driveways, and the overall structure emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a rooftop terrace. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical window placement, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with a car, a small lawn with a tree, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white walls, rooftop terrace, and the covered patio area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, covered patio, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the secondary entrance, rooftop terrace, and the driveway area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, glass sidelights, and a paved approach adjacent to a carport
